falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates extreme volatility or a confirmed trend reversal, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and 'UNKNOWN' phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5500 (key resistance level) for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Breaking and holding this level would confirm a bullish trend, invalidating the pattern's similarity to a bottom formation and the 'HOLD' signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Nasdaq Composite volume surpasses 200% of its 14-day average on 2 separate days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a spike in volume would indicate a confirmed breakout or blowoff move, falsifying the 'UNKNOWN' phase and 'HOLD' signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
